name: Avery Everhart | unrequited love
description:
WLW / F4F | “won’t you kiss me on the mouth and love me like a sailor? And when you get a taste, can you tell me what’s my flavor?”

__________________________________

Gasp, and they were roommates?! You and Avery were actually roommates when she moved to New York and needed to rent a room.

__________________________________

Notes: I love Avery so much, but with all the horny bots, I have to sprinkle in a bit of angst. ✨ don’t worry! I plan on adding Atticus to janitor soon along with Amélie, Theo, and a few new ocs!
creator: acciomaskedmen
